one_time_description: Treaty 8 restoration fund received in fiscal 2023, classified under Other revenue
economic_notes: Nation has equity interests in Kihew-Sas GP Ltd. (20%), Six Nations Ventures Limited Partnership (16.67%), and Tse K'Wa Heritage Society (33.33%). Oil and gas revenue of $699,000. Treaty 8 Heritage Trust distributions of $800,000. Prophet River First Nation Trust distributions of $12,525,731. Treaty 8 restoration fund of $16,677,890 received from Province of BC.
notes: Audit is qualified due to non-adoption of new asset retirement obligations standard effective April 1, 2022. Nine OGOs consolidated using consolidation method; two GBEs and one GBP accounted for by modified equity method. Prophet River First Nation Trust and Treaty 8 Heritage Trust are NOT consolidated. Large one-time Treaty 8 restoration fund of $16,677,890 received from Province of BC significantly inflates 2023 revenue. Administration expenses include $8,243,616 contribution back to the Prophet River First Nation Trust which is also a large non-recurring item. Net financial assets jumped from $2,780,352 to $26,394,519 largely due to these items. No remuneration schedule included in the financial statements provided. total_government_transfers calculated as: ISC $2,972,215 + CMHC $17,367 + FNESC $255,340 + FNHA $848,846 + Province of BC $10,417,023 + Treaty 8 Heritage Trust $800,000 + BC First Nations Gaming $323,047 + Treaty 8 Heritage Trust deferred = $15,634,838 approximate; revised to include all identified government sources: 2972215+17367+255340+848846+10417023+800000+323047 = 15633838; osr = 48395187 - 15633838 = 32761349. Note: osr and total_government_transfers adjusted to exclude Prophet River First Nation Trust distributions as trust is not a government transfer.
